queries.sql: SELECT bitAnd(intCol, longCol), bitOr(intCol, longCol), bitXor(intCol, longCol) FROM {numTbl}
SELECT bit_and(intCol, longCol), bit_or(intCol, longCol), bit_xor(intCol, longCol) FROM {numTbl}

queries.description: test unary and shift bit functions
queries.sql: SELECT bitNot(intCol), bitShiftLeft(intCol, shiftCol), bitShiftRight(intCol, shiftCol), bitShiftRightUnsigned(intCol, shiftCol), bitShiftRightLogical(intCol, shiftCol) FROM {numTbl}

queries.description: test bit mask and bit extraction functions
queries.sql: SELECT bitMask(shiftCol), bitExtract(longCol, shiftCol), extractBit(longCol, shiftCol) FROM {numTbl}
